name: omnidrive
description: Unified multi-Google Drive storage gateway built on Cloudflare Workers
author: abilfida

scripts.test: npm run test --prefix packages/worker && npm run test --prefix packages/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --prefix packages/worker -- --dry-run && npm run build --prefix packages/web
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.deploy:code: npm run build --prefix packages/worker && npm run deploy --prefix packages/worker && npm run build --prefix packages/web && npm run deploy --prefix packages/web
scripts.deploy:full: npm run db:migrate:remote --prefix packages/worker && npm run deploy:code
